lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Corpuscarii Electro-Priests
■ Fulgurite Electro-Priests
■ Kataphron Breachers
■ Kataphron Destroyers
■ Skitarii Rangers
■ Skitarii Vanguard

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Lethal Hits] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the  end of the phase, all models in this model’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Skitarii Rangers
■ Skitarii Vanguard

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly SKITARII unit that is Battle-shocked and within 6" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Each time you select the bearer’s unit
as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the IGNORES COVER ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While an enemy unit (excluding Vehicle units) is within 3" of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the IGNORES COVER ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Corpuscarii Electro-Priests
■ Fulgurite Electro-Priests
■ Kataphron Breachers
■ Kataphron Destroyers
■ Skitarii Rangers
■ Skitarii Vanguard

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If that unit has the Electro-Priests keyword, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy Vehicle unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds and, until the end of the phase, the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that enemy unit is worsened by 1.
